doc_title: Product Sheet: Quectel BG95-M3 LPWA Board
chunk_text:
Document Title: Product Sheet: Quectel BG95-M3 LPWA Board
Document Type: Product Document
Department: Engineering
Section: Detailed Information

### Technical Specifications
Low-power cellular telematics hardware board for wide-area IoT projects.

* **Dimensions:** 56mm x 55mm (Diagnostics), 50mm x 50mm (Quectel LPWA).
* **Protocols Interfaced:** SAE J1939, OBD-II, SAE J1708.
* **Sensors Integrated:** Humidity, temperature, atmospheric pressure.
* **Power Supply:** Micro USB, 3.7V rechargeable battery, 5V solar connector.

### Core Capabilities
* Bluetooth 5 (BLE) for local diagnostic pairings.
* Integrated GPS/GNSS high-sensitivity tracker (Quectel LC86G).
* Hardware-level security storage via cryptographic chip.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: IT Support & Security Systems (Part 1)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: IT Support & Security Systems (Part 1)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: IT Support
Section: Overview

Curated Q&A list covering IT Support & Security Systems at Inurum Technologies - Part 1.
raw_content: Curated Q&A list covering IT Support & Security Systems at Inurum Technologies - Part 1.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: IT Support & Security Systems (Part 1)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: IT Support & Security Systems (Part 1)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: IT Support
Section: Detailed Information

### Q01: What password manager is recommended?
* **Answer:** Employees must use the company-provided Bitwarden account for all credentials.

### Q02: How do I request a new software license?
* **Answer:** Raise a request in the IT support channel #it-tickets with manager approval.

### Q03: What is the response SLA for IT issues?
* **Answer:** IT support tickets are resolved within 4 hours for high-priority items.

### Q04: How do I configure Multi-Factor Authentication?
* **Answer:** Follow the steps in the IT Security Awareness handbook via Authenticator app.

### Q05: What should I do if my laptop is lost or stolen?
* **Answer:** Immediately contact Ramesh Kumar and lock the device via MDM panel.

### Q06: Can I install personal software on my work laptop?
* **Answer:** No, installing unauthorized third-party software is a security violation.

### Q07: How do I connect to the office Wi-Fi network?
* **Answer:** Connect to the 'Inurum-Secure' network using your personal LDAP credentials.

### Q08: Are company laptops encrypted?
* **Answer:** Yes, all laptops are encrypted using BitLocker (Windows) or FileVault (macOS).

### Q09: How do I access client code repositories?
* **Answer:** Access requires GitHub SSH keys registered with your company email.

### Q10: What is the policy on sharing API keys?
* **Answer:** API keys must never be shared in Slack or Git; use HashiCorp Vault.

### Q11: How do I report a suspected phishing email?
* **Answer:** Forward the email to security@inurum.com and delete it from your inbox.

### Q12: Can I access production databases directly?
* **Answer:** Direct production database access is restricted; use read-only bastion hosts.

### Q13: How often are security awareness trainings conducted?
* **Answer:** Awareness training is mandatory for all employees every 6 months.

### Q14: What is the maximum file size for email attachments?
* **Answer:** The maximum size for outgoing email attachments is 25 MB.

### Q15: How do I request a backup laptop during repairs?
* **Answer:** IT support maintains backup laptops at reception for immediate issue.

### Q16: Are office networks monitored?
* **Answer:** Yes, office network traffic is monitored for security and compliance audits.

### Q17: How do I configure the corporate VPN on my device?
* **Answer:** Use OpenVPN client with configuration files supplied by IT support.

### Q18: What version of Flutter is standard for development?
* **Answer:** We standardize on the latest stable Flutter version managed via FVM.

### Q19: How do I update my local environment dependencies?
* **Answer:** Run fvm use and install standard packages via pubspec.

### Q20: What tool is used for remote system troubleshooting?
* **Answer:** IT uses TeamViewer or AnyDesk for secure remote troubleshooting sessions.

### Q21: How do I reset my company LDAP password?
* **Answer:** Reset it via the self-service portal at identity.inurum.com.

### Q22: Can I use my personal mobile phone for testing?
* **Answer:** Yes, but it must be enrolled in the basic MDM sandbox partition.

### Q23: How do I dispose of confidential printouts?
* **Answer:** Confidential documents must be shredded using the office paper shredder.

### Q24: Are USB drives allowed on company machines?
* **Answer:** USB storage devices are disabled by default; requests require security approval.

### Q25: How are software security patches applied?
* **Answer:** System updates are pushed automatically every Sunday night at 11 PM.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Human Resources & Company Policies (Part 1)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: HR
Section: Overview

Curated Q&A list covering Human Resources & Company Policies at Inurum Technologies - Part 1.
raw_content: Curated Q&A list covering Human Resources & Company Policies at Inurum Technologies - Part 1.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: Human Resources & Company Policies (Part 1)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Human Resources & Company Policies (Part 1)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: HR
Section: Detailed Information

### Q01: What are the core working hours at Inurum?
* **Answer:** Core office hours are 09:00 to 18:00 (Monday to Friday) local time.

### Q02: How do I log my daily attendance?
* **Answer:** Log attendance via the internal ERP app or portal before 09:30 AM IST.

### Q03: What is the process to apply for a sick leave?
* **Answer:** Submit a request in the ERP under Leave Management and notify your manager via Slack.

### Q04: Are there paid annual leaves at Inurum?
* **Answer:** Yes, employees receive 18 paid annual leaves, accrued monthly.

### Q05: What is the work from home policy?
* **Answer:** Employees can request WFH for up to 2 days per week, subject to project manager approval.

### Q06: Does the company reimburse WFH internet bills?
* **Answer:** Yes, internet bills up to $30 (INR 2500) per month are reimbursable for regular WFH roles.

### Q07: How do I submit travel expense reimbursement claims?
* **Answer:** Submit claims with receipts in the reimbursement module by the 25th of each month.

### Q08: Who should I contact for salary slip queries?
* **Answer:** Contact Rohit Verma in Finance or write to accounts@inurum.com.

### Q09: What is the standard notice period for exit?
* **Answer:** The notice period is 60 days for permanent employees and 30 days during probation.

### Q10: Do we have health insurance coverage?
* **Answer:** Yes, group medical cover is provided for employees and their immediate dependents.

### Q11: Are employee referrals rewarded?
* **Answer:** Yes, employee referrals for technical roles receive a bonus upon successful onboarding.

### Q12: How do I report a policy violation?
* **Answer:** Report violations confidentially to Priya Mehta at hr@inurum.com.

### Q13: What holidays are observed in the India office?
* **Answer:** Inurum observes 10 gazetted public holidays in India, announced in January.

### Q14: Does the Italy office follow the same holidays?
* **Answer:** The Italy office follows the local Italian public holiday calendar.

### Q15: What is the dress code in the offices?
* **Answer:** The dress code is smart casual from Monday to Thursday, and casual on Friday.

### Q16: How is the annual performance review conducted?
* **Answer:** Performance reviews occur in April, based on KPI goals tracked in Jira.

### Q17: Can I carry forward unused annual leaves?
* **Answer:** Up to 5 unused annual leaves can be carried forward to the next year.

### Q18: What is the policy for parental leave?
* **Answer:** Maternity leave is 26 weeks; paternity leave is 2 weeks of paid time off.

### Q19: Is there study leave for certifications?
* **Answer:** Yes, employees can request up to 3 days of paid leave to take certified exams.

### Q20: Does the company cover certification costs?
* **Answer:** Yes, pre-approved certification fees are fully reimbursed upon passing.

### Q21: How are work hours tracked for dedicated customer teams?
* **Answer:** Dedicated teams log hours directly into the client's tracking system and duplicate in our ERP.

### Q22: What is the policy on intellectual property created by employees?
* **Answer:** All IP created during employment is the sole property of Inurum Technologies.

### Q23: Are team lunches reimbursable?
* **Answer:** Team lunches are reimbursable up to $15 per person with prior manager approval.

### Q24: What happens during a probation review?
* **Answer:** A review is held at the 3-month mark to confirm performance expectations are met.

### Q25: Can probation be extended?
* **Answer:** Probation can be extended up to another 3 months if performance targets are not met.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: Sales Process & Client Onboarding (Part 1)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Sales Process & Client Onboarding (Part 1)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: Sales
Section: Detailed Information

### Q01: What is the initial response SLA for sales inquiries?
* **Answer:** Inbound sales inquiries must be answered within 24 hours.

### Q02: How do I request a free technical consultation?
* **Answer:** Clients can schedule a 30-minute call via inurum.com/start.

### Q03: Who leads business development campaigns?
* **Answer:** Shubham Saratha is the BDE lead coordinating sales strategies.

### Q04: What is the conversion target for sales leads?
* **Answer:** Our sales goal is a conversion rate greater than 25% on qualified leads.

### Q05: Where are new leads logged?
* **Answer:** All customer leads and communications are logged in the HubSpot CRM.

### Q06: What is the standard duration of an MVP project?
* **Answer:** A standard mobile MVP ranges from 8 to 14 weeks from project kickoff.

### Q07: How is a project budget estimated?
* **Answer:** Estimates are prepared after a tech plan blueprint phase based on sprint rates.

### Q08: What is the turnaround time for a custom quote?
* **Answer:** Custom quotes and feasibility reviews are delivered in 12–24 hours.

### Q09: How do we market our technical capability?
* **Answer:** Through developer blog posts, case studies, and LinkedIn updates.

### Q10: Who reviews commercial Statements of Work?
* **Answer:** SOWs are drafted by sales and approved by Shubham Jain or Kamlesh Kushwah.

### Q11: What pricing structures do we offer?
* **Answer:** We offer monthly dedicated developer retainers and Time & Materials sprint rates.

### Q12: How do we handle international billing?
* **Answer:** Invoices are generated in USD or EUR and paid via bank transfers.

### Q13: What is the discount policy for startups?
* **Answer:** Startups with seed funding can request up to 15% discount on early sprints.

### Q14: How do we secure project renewals?
* **Answer:** Through quarterly feedback check-ins and performance KPI tracking.

### Q15: Who coordinates marketing content creation?
* **Answer:** Neha Gupta coordinates the marketing team and content writers.

### Q16: What SEO keywords are target metrics?
* **Answer:** Keywords: Flutter developer Indore, IoT development company, SaaS engineering.

### Q17: How is client satisfaction measured?
* **Answer:** CSAT reviews are conducted mid-project and post-launch via forms.

### Q18: Where do we publish case studies?
* **Answer:** Case studies are published on inurum.com/case-studies and in the company repository.

### Q19: What is the process to draft a custom NDA?
* **Answer:** Use the NDA template in the contracts folder and consult legal counsel.

### Q20: How is a client kickoff meeting scheduled?
* **Answer:** Kickoff meetings are scheduled within 48 hours of contract signing.

### Q21: What resources are assigned to sales calls?
* **Answer:** Sales calls are supported by a technical architect (usually Shivansh Kushwah).

### Q22: Do we participate in industrial conferences?
* **Answer:** Yes, we participate in IoT and mobile tech conferences in Germany and India.

### Q23: How do we coordinate with Italy partners?
* **Answer:** Via our Legnano office using the coordinate email contact@techcrafters.it.

### Q24: What is our average client retention rate?
* **Answer:** Our customer retention rate is 92% across all enterprise engagements.

### Q25: Where do we track sales commission metrics?
* **Answer:** Commission logs are stored securely in the Finance ERP module.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: Services Offering & Custom Products (Part 1)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Services Offering & Custom Products (Part 1)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: Sales
Section: Detailed Information

### Q01: What services does Inurum offer?
* **Answer:** Mobile apps, IoT embedded systems, backend microservices, and dedicated developer teams.

### Q02: What is the ELIoT product category?
* **Answer:** ELIoT is a consumer IoT, smart home, and AgTech plant monitoring system.

### Q03: Does ELIoT require a companion mobile app?
* **Answer:** Yes, the ELIoT app displays live telemetry, alerts, and care plans.

### Q04: What sensors are built into the ELIoT wall?
* **Answer:** Ambient temp, light intensity/spectrum, humidity, soil moisture, and soil pH.

### Q05: How long does the ELIoT battery last?
* **Answer:** The custom hardware runs for up to 6 months on a single Qi wireless charge.

### Q06: What is the SmartStarter telematics solution?
* **Answer:** It is an enterprise plug-and-play semi-truck remote engine controller.

### Q07: Does SmartStarter violate truck warranties?
* **Answer:** No, the PCB module connects to OEM harnesses without wiring cuts.

### Q08: What safety loops are built into SmartStarter?
* **Answer:** Auto-start on low battery/temp, pre-trip parameters check, and auto-shutdown.

### Q09: What is the Fruitrack agricultural application?
* **Answer:** A worker productivity and harvest telemetry tracking system built in Flutter.

### Q10: How does Fruitrack handle offline rural environments?
* **Answer:** It uses a local SQLite queue syncing to AWS cloud when connected.

### Q11: What is the data entry speed target for Fruitrack?
* **Answer:** Supervisors log harvest data in under 10 seconds per worker.

### Q12: What is the Current Detection Sensor System?
* **Answer:** An industrial IoT welder monitor logging AC/DC current pulses.

### Q13: Does the current sensor require wiring modifications?
* **Answer:** No, it clamps around the output cable using non-invasive Hall Effect.

### Q14: What metrics does the welder system calculate per pulse?
* **Answer:** Peak/average current, pulse duration, residual current, energy, thermal load.

### Q15: What is the Mobile Refrigeration Control System?
* **Answer:** A telematics cold-chain tracker logging temperature, GPS, and power status.

### Q16: What cellular module is integrated into the cold-chain system?
* **Answer:** Quectel cellular modules transmitting GPS and telemetry over LTE.

### Q17: Does Inurum provide IoT manufacturing support?
* **Answer:** Yes, we deliver Gerber files, BOM, testing jigs, and provisioning scripts.

### Q18: What is the Smart Parichay digital platform?
* **Answer:** An NFC and QR-enabled digital business card platform syncing 50k+ profiles.

### Q19: What is Creative Construction Ledger (CCL)?
* **Answer:** A multi-tenant cost estimation and management SaaS for construction projects.

### Q20: What is Worthwhiz Financials?
* **Answer:** A premium stock research and investment advisory SaaS platform.

### Q21: Does Inurum build custom CRM software?
* **Answer:** We integrate third-party CRMs and build custom database APIs where needed.

### Q22: What is the standard framework for web admin panels?
* **Answer:** We build React-based dashboards using modern design libraries.

### Q23: How do we secure streaming APIs in eBaba TV?
* **Answer:** Using AWS CloudFront signed cookies and token-based HLS restrictions.

### Q24: What geolocation libraries are used in FamConnect?
* **Answer:** We use custom native background location trackers for iOS and Android.

### Q25: What database is utilized for the school ERP portal?
* **Answer:** DgDiary India uses MySQL databases paired with secure PHP backends.

chunk_text:

Curated Q&A list covering Engineering Practices & Code Guidelines at Inurum Technologies - Part 2.
raw_content: Curated Q&A list covering Engineering Practices & Code Guidelines at Inurum Technologies - Part 2.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: Engineering Practices & Code Guidelines (Part 2)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Engineering Practices & Code Guidelines (Part 2)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: Engineering
Section: Detailed Information

### Q26: What is the maximum response latency target for APIs?
* **Answer:** Average API response latency must remain below 50ms under standard loads.

### Q27: How do we secure BLE communications?
* **Answer:** We use encrypted BLE pairing keys and dynamic handshake tokens.

### Q28: What is the protocol for heavy-vehicle telematics?
* **Answer:** We implement SAE J1939 protocols to read CAN-bus telemetry.

### Q29: How do we handle passenger car diagnostics?
* **Answer:** We decode standard OBD-II parameter IDs (PIDs) using ISO 15765-4 CAN.

### Q30: What RS-485 standard is used for legacy vehicles?
* **Answer:** We use SAE J1708 serial protocols over Modbus transceivers.

### Q31: How do we verify battery optimization on IoT hardware?
* **Answer:** We measure current consumption in sleep states using specialized power monitors.

### Q32: What tools are used to document APIs?
* **Answer:** We use OpenAPI / Swagger specifications compiled in the code repositories.

### Q33: How do we handle duplicate HTTP requests?
* **Answer:** Implement idempotency keys on the server and check keys in Redis.

### Q34: What cache strategy is used for hot records?
* **Answer:** Cache-aside strategy leveraging Redis with configured TTL values.

### Q35: How do we isolate developer sandboxes on AWS?
* **Answer:** We use AWS Organizations with separate sandbox accounts per engineer.

### Q36: What docker base image is preferred?
* **Answer:** We use minimal alpine or distroless images to reduce vulnerability footprints.

### Q37: How do we verify JWT signatures?
* **Answer:** Gateways check signatures using public keys fetched from our JWKS endpoint.

### Q38: What is the backup target for PostgreSQL?
* **Answer:** Hourly incremental backups and weekly full backups saved to AWS S3.

### Q39: How do we implement search features in databases?
* **Answer:** We sync data changes to OpenSearch clusters using CDC pipelines.

### Q40: What is the standard unit test framework for Dart?
* **Answer:** We use the standard test package in Dart SDK with mocktail for mocks.

### Q41: How do we manage secrets in Kubernetes?
* **Answer:** We use External Secrets Operator synced with AWS Secrets Manager.

### Q42: What is the standard container registry?
* **Answer:** AWS Elastic Container Registry (ECR) with automated security scanning.

### Q43: How do we perform database schema updates?
* **Answer:** Migrations are run during low-traffic windows using blue-green models.

### Q44: What is the testing procedure for firmware?
* **Answer:** Hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) automated test setups in our laboratory.

### Q45: How do we track memory leaks in Flutter?
* **Answer:** We use Flutter DevTools memory profiling tools during QA passes.

### Q46: What is the logging standard for backend services?
* **Answer:** Structured JSON logging containing timestamp, trace ID, and severity level.

### Q47: How do we handle rate limiting on public APIs?
* **Answer:** We enforce rate limiting at the API gateway layer using token bucket rules.

### Q48: What tool is used for automated regression tests?
* **Answer:** We write integration test suites using Flutter Driver and Appium.

### Q49: How do we secure server-to-server communications?
* **Answer:** Through mutual TLS (mTLS) configurations inside our service mesh.

### Q50: Where are technical coding standards published?
* **Answer:** standards are detailed in the Engineering Handbook inside the training section.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: Operations, Logistics & Client Support (Part 2)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Operations, Logistics & Client Support (Part 2)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: Operations
Section: Detailed Information

### Q26: How is hardware lab access managed?
* **Answer:** Access is restricted to authorized embedded and IoT engineers only.

### Q27: Where are client feedback surveys compiled?
* **Answer:**  surveys are compiled in the Operations database for review.

### Q28: What happens during a project retrospective?
* **Answer:** Teams analyze sprint velocities, code quality, and process improvements.

### Q29: How do we support remote workers in different timezones?
* **Answer:** We establish core collaboration hours (13:30 to 17:30 IST).

### Q30: Who reviews monthly cloud hosting invoices?
* **Answer:** Operations and Finance review AWS/GCP bills before payroll processing.

### Q31: What is the coordinates location of Indore headquarters? (Update 1)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Coordinates are 22.7196° N, 75.8577° E PU4 Indore. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q32: What timezone does the Legnano office operate in? (Update 2)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Operations run in Central European Time (CET/CEST) UTC+1. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q33: How do I contact the Legnano operations partner? (Update 3)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Email contact@techcrafters.it or call +39 03311586334. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q34: What is the support contact email for active clients? (Update 4)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Active clients can email support@inurum.com for quick ticket routing. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q35: How are client support tickets prioritized? (Update 5)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: By severity level matching SLA parameters in the contracts. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q36: Who manages the physical assets in the Indore office? (Update 6)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Kamlesh Kushwah manages the office facilities and engineering lab. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q37: What is the SLA response time for Tier 2 support? (Update 7)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Tier 2 support guarantees response in under 2 hours for critical issues. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q38: Where are physical hardware prototypes tested? (Update 8)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Tested in our dedicated hardware lab in Indore Scheme No 54. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q01: What is the coordinates location of Indore headquarters?
* **Answer:** Coordinates are 22.7196° N, 75.8577° E PU4 Indore.

### Q02: What timezone does the Legnano office operate in?
* **Answer:** Operations run in Central European Time (CET/CEST) UTC+1.

### Q03: How do I contact the Legnano operations partner?
* **Answer:** Email contact@techcrafters.it or call +39 03311586334.

### Q04: What is the support contact email for active clients?
* **Answer:** Active clients can email support@inurum.com for quick ticket routing.

### Q05: How are client support tickets prioritized?
* **Answer:** By severity level matching SLA parameters in the contracts.

### Q06: Who manages the physical assets in the Indore office?
* **Answer:** Kamlesh Kushwah manages the office facilities and engineering lab.

### Q07: What is the SLA response time for Tier 2 support?
* **Answer:** Tier 2 support guarantees response in under 2 hours for critical issues.

### Q08: Where are physical hardware prototypes tested?
* **Answer:** Tested in our dedicated hardware lab in Indore Scheme No 54.

### Q09: How do we ship hardware prototypes to Italy?
* **Answer:** Shipped via DHL/FedEx with compliance paperwork managed by operations.

### Q10: Who maintains office access permissions?
* **Answer:** IT support manages badge credentials and cloud IAM permissions.

### Q11: What is the average experience level of Inurum engineers?
* **Answer:** The average experience level is 8+ years across all technology stacks.

### Q12: What is the talent retention rate at Inurum?
* **Answer:** We maintain a 96% talent retention rate for engineering positions.

### Q13: How fast can Inurum onboard a new developer?
* **Answer:** Onboarding and workspace access are completed in under 48 hours.

### Q14: What is the average time-to-hire for new recruits?
* **Answer:** The recruitment time-to-hire average is 14 days.

### Q15: Are all developers proficient in English?
* **Answer:** Yes, we guarantee 100% English proficiency across all teams.

### Q16: Who is the primary owner of Inurum Technologies?
* **Answer:** Shubham Jain and Kamlesh Kushwah are the co-owners.

### Q17: Does Inurum have ISO certification?
* **Answer:** Yes, Inurum is an ISO 9001 certified organization for quality management.

### Q18: Are our cloud environments SOC2 certified?
* **Answer:** Our designs follow SOC2 and HIPAA-ready architecture requirements.

### Q19: What is the response target on general project inquiries?
* **Answer:** Under 24 hours response time on all project inquiries.

### Q20: Where do employees report building facilities issues?
* **Answer:** Raise tickets in Slack channel #facilities or contact operations.

### Q21: How do we handle client site visits?
* **Answer:** Coordinated via Shubham Saratha with accommodation support in Indore/Legnano.

### Q22: Are clients given access to Jira workspaces?
* **Answer:** Yes, clients receive observer permissions on their active boards.

### Q23: What backup power exists in the Indore headquarters?
* **Answer:** The facility is backed by a 50kVA diesel generator and online UPS systems.

### Q24: How do we verify visitor identity at the office?
* **Answer:** Visitors must sign in at reception and carry guest badges.

### Q25: Are developer workstations secured physically?
* **Answer:** Yes, workstations use Kensington lock slots and require badge entries.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: Services Offering & Custom Products (Part 2)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Services Offering & Custom Products (Part 2)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: Sales
Section: Detailed Information

### Q26: How does the Smart Ring FYFIT synchronize data?
* **Answer:** Via Bluetooth Low Energy paired with a custom native Android/iOS service.

### Q27: What is the default charging standard for 8bottle?
* **Answer:** Qi-standard wireless charging configurations built into the base.

### Q28: Does SHAZCOM GPS support remote engine shutdown?
* **Answer:** Yes, features remote engine lock/unlock controls via GPRS commands.

### Q29: What compliance standard does Semi ELD satisfy?
* **Answer:** Fulfills North American Hours of Service (HOS) logs rules.

### Q30: How are custom testing jigs designed?
* **Answer:** We build custom test layouts and write python diagnostic scripts in-house.

### Q31: What services does Inurum offer? (Update 1)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Mobile apps, IoT embedded systems, backend microservices, and dedicated developer teams. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q32: What is the ELIoT product category? (Update 2)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: ELIoT is a consumer IoT, smart home, and AgTech plant monitoring system. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q33: Does ELIoT require a companion mobile app? (Update 3)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Yes, the ELIoT app displays live telemetry, alerts, and care plans. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q34: What sensors are built into the ELIoT wall? (Update 4)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Ambient temp, light intensity/spectrum, humidity, soil moisture, and soil pH. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q35: How long does the ELIoT battery last? (Update 5)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: The custom hardware runs for up to 6 months on a single Qi wireless charge. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q36: What is the SmartStarter telematics solution? (Update 6)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: It is an enterprise plug-and-play semi-truck remote engine controller. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q37: Does SmartStarter violate truck warranties? (Update 7)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: No, the PCB module connects to OEM harnesses without wiring cuts. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q38: What safety loops are built into SmartStarter? (Update 8)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Auto-start on low battery/temp, pre-trip parameters check, and auto-shutdown. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q39: What is the Fruitrack agricultural application? (Update 9)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: A worker productivity and harvest telemetry tracking system built in Flutter. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q40: How does Fruitrack handle offline rural environments? (Update 10)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: It uses a local SQLite queue syncing to AWS cloud when connected. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q41: What is the data entry speed target for Fruitrack? (Update 11)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Supervisors log harvest data in under 10 seconds per worker. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q42: What is the Current Detection Sensor System? (Update 12)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: An industrial IoT welder monitor logging AC/DC current pulses. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q43: Does the current sensor require wiring modifications? (Update 13)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: No, it clamps around the output cable using non-invasive Hall Effect. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q44: What metrics does the welder system calculate per pulse? (Update 14)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Peak/average current, pulse duration, residual current, energy, thermal load. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q45: What is the Mobile Refrigeration Control System? (Update 15)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: A telematics cold-chain tracker logging temperature, GPS, and power status. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q46: What cellular module is integrated into the cold-chain system? (Update 16)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Quectel cellular modules transmitting GPS and telemetry over LTE. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q47: Does Inurum provide IoT manufacturing support? (Update 17)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Yes, we deliver Gerber files, BOM, testing jigs, and provisioning scripts. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q48: What is the Smart Parichay digital platform? (Update 18)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: An NFC and QR-enabled digital business card platform syncing 50k+ profiles. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q49: What is Creative Construction Ledger (CCL)? (Update 19)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: A multi-tenant cost estimation and management SaaS for construction projects. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q50: What is Worthwhiz Financials? (Update 20)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: A premium stock research and investment advisory SaaS platform. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Engineering Practices & Code Guidelines (Part 1)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: Engineering
Section: Overview

Curated Q&A list covering Engineering Practices & Code Guidelines at Inurum Technologies - Part 1.
raw_content: Curated Q&A list covering Engineering Practices & Code Guidelines at Inurum Technologies - Part 1.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: Engineering Practices & Code Guidelines (Part 1)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Engineering Practices & Code Guidelines (Part 1)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: Engineering
Section: Detailed Information

### Q01: What is the standard architecture for Flutter apps?
* **Answer:** We follow Clean Architecture using the BLoC state management framework.

### Q02: How do we handle API error codes in mobile apps?
* **Answer:** Implement standardized error wrappers transforming HTTP errors to user messages.

### Q03: What tool is used for API contract testing?
* **Answer:** We use Postman Collections and custom integrations in GitHub Actions.

### Q04: How do we avoid frame drops in Flutter animations?
* **Answer:** Offload complex operations to Dart Isolates and avoid rebuilding heavy widgets.

### Q05: What is the standard database for backend platforms?
* **Answer:** We utilize PostgreSQL for relation data and Redis for cache layers.

### Q06: How do we enforce multi-tenant isolation in PostgreSQL?
* **Answer:** We use Row-Level Security (RLS) policies based on the tenant ID.

### Q07: What cellular module is standard for IoT projects?
* **Answer:** We utilize the Quectel BG95-M3 module for global LPWA projects.

### Q08: How do we handle offline synchronization in mobile apps?
* **Answer:** We use local SQLite queues and commit changes to the backend upon reconnect.

### Q09: What microcontroller is standard for telematics boards?
* **Answer:** We design custom boards leveraging the dual-core ESP32-S3 microcontroller.

### Q10: What communications protocol is used for IoT data?
* **Answer:** MQTT over secure TLS is our default protocol for sensor telematics.

### Q11: How do we implement remote firmware updates?
* **Answer:** We design custom OTA pipelines with dual-partition flash and verification rollbacks.

### Q12: What is the standard coding format for Java services?
* **Answer:** We follow Google Java Style Guide verified via checkstyle plug-ins.

### Q13: How do we manage database migrations in Node.js?
* **Answer:** We use Knex.js or Sequelize migrations committed inside the source repository.

### Q14: What tools are used for static code analysis?
* **Answer:** SonarQube and Dart Analyze are integrated into our GitHub workflows.

### Q15: How do we perform stress testing on REST APIs?
* **Answer:** We run k6 or Apache JMeter load tests simulating concurrent requests.

### Q16: What is the code coverage benchmark for pull requests?
* **Answer:** All pull requests require a minimum of 80% test code coverage.

### Q17: How do we handle sensor noise in telematics boards?
* **Answer:** We implement digital signal processing (DSP) and Kalman filtering algorithms.

### Q18: What software is used for PCB schematic design?
* **Answer:** We use KiCAD and Autodesk EAGLE for circuit board layouts.

### Q19: How do we test PCB signal integrity?
* **Answer:** Through high-frequency oscilloscope testing and RF path tuning jigs.

### Q20: What RTOS is preferred for embedded firmware?
* **Answer:** FreeRTOS and Zephyr RTOS are our standard embedded operating systems.

### Q21: How do we manage code dependencies in Go services?
* **Answer:** We use Go Modules and verify packages in the go.sum file.

### Q22: What is the process to trigger a production release?
* **Answer:** releases require passing the automated CI/CD pipeline and approval from HOD.

### Q23: How do we monitor production microservices?
* **Answer:** We use Prometheus metrics visualized via Grafana dashboards.

### Q24: What is the standard response structure for APIs?
* **Answer:** APIs return JSON payloads with data, status, and error properties.

### Q25: How do we store telemetry datasets?
* **Answer:** We stream data to Kafka queues and ingest into ClickHouse for analytics.

### Q04: How do we avoid frame drops in Flutter animations?
* **Answer:** Offload complex operations to Dart Isolates and avoid rebuilding heavy widgets.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: IT Support & Security Systems (Part 2)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: IT Support & Security Systems (Part 2)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: IT Support
Section: Detailed Information

### Q26: What should I do if a system alert goes off?
* **Answer:** Follow the steps in the Incident Response SOP immediately.

### Q27: How do I access the Jira project boards?
* **Answer:** Login via jira.inurum.com using your Google Workspace corporate account.

### Q28: What is the configuration for the staging database?
* **Answer:** Database details are stored in AWS Secrets Manager under staging/db.

### Q29: Are developers given root privileges on laptops?
* **Answer:** Yes, local admin rights are granted for development but monitored via MDM.

### Q30: How do I request an external monitor?
* **Answer:** Submit an asset request form via the ERP portal under IT Hardware.

### Q31: Can I use chat GPT for coding?
* **Answer:** Yes, but sharing client proprietary source code or data is strictly prohibited.

### Q32: What is the default SSH key standard?
* **Answer:** We require ED25519 SSH keys for Git and server authentication.

### Q33: How do I clear local cache on my Flutter testing device?
* **Answer:** Run flutter clean and rebuild the target bundle.

### Q34: Where are server error logs stored?
* **Answer:** Logs are forwarded to the central AWS OpenSearch cluster for analytics.

### Q35: How do I request access to AWS console?
* **Answer:** Submit a ticket to #it-tickets specifying the IAM role and project scope.

### Q36: What is the secure token reference?
* **Answer:** The internal security reference is token code IN-7742-XP.

### Q37: Are emails archived?
* **Answer:** Yes, company emails are archived for legal compliance for 5 years.

### Q38: How do I report a bug in the internal ERP?
* **Answer:** Submit a ticket under the ERP project queue in Jira.

### Q39: Can I connect to office servers from a public network?
* **Answer:** No, connection requires active corporate VPN tunnels.

### Q40: How do I clean my company laptop keyboard?
* **Answer:** Use compressed air cans available in the IT support cabinet.

### Q41: What is the process to upgrade my RAM?
* **Answer:** IT reviews hardware specs; upgrades require department head approval.

### Q42: How do I setup my corporate email on mobile?
* **Answer:** Install Microsoft Outlook or Gmail and sign in using Google OAuth.

### Q43: Are web filters active in the office?
* **Answer:** Yes, categories like malware and unauthorized torrents are blocked.

### Q44: What is the backup frequency for work laptops?
* **Answer:** Laptops auto-sync document folders to Google Drive daily.

### Q45: Where do I store PCB design files?
* **Answer:** All Gerber and KiCAD project files must reside in the secure hardware repository.

### Q46: How do I request a testing device?
* **Answer:** Check out devices from Kamlesh Kushwah in the hardware lab.

### Q47: What is the standard screen lock timeout?
* **Answer:** Workstation screens automatically lock after 5 minutes of inactivity.

### Q48: How do I configure git configurations?
* **Answer:** Ensure user.name is your full name and user.email is your @inurum.com mail.

### Q49: Can I use personal email for client communications?
* **Answer:** No, all client communications must go through corporate channels.

### Q50: What should I do if my VPN connection fails?
* **Answer:** Check your local internet connection, restart OpenVPN, or contact IT.

chunk_text:

Curated Q&A list covering Human Resources & Company Policies at Inurum Technologies - Part 2.
raw_content: Curated Q&A list covering Human Resources & Company Policies at Inurum Technologies - Part 2.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: Human Resources & Company Policies (Part 2)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Human Resources & Company Policies (Part 2)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: HR
Section: Detailed Information

### Q26: What support is provided during bereavement?
* **Answer:** Employees receive 5 days of compassionate leave for immediate family members.

### Q27: How do I update my emergency contact details?
* **Answer:** Update details directly in the profile editor of the ERP portal.

### Q28: Are internships offered at Inurum?
* **Answer:** Yes, we run a 6-month developer internship program starting in January and July.

### Q29: Is moonlighting permitted?
* **Answer:** No, employees are not permitted to engage in external employment or freelance work.

### Q30: What is the company policy on gift acceptance?
* **Answer:** Employees cannot accept client gifts exceeding $50 in value without approval.

### Q31: How are overtime hours compensated?
* **Answer:** Overtime hours must be pre-approved and are compensated or given as comp-off.

### Q32: What is the policy for medical emergencies at the office?
* **Answer:** First-aid kits are available at reception; immediately contact Kamlesh Kushwah.

### Q33: Are training materials provided to freshers?
* **Answer:** Yes, freshers undergo a structured 4-week training plan using our handbooks.

### Q34: Can leaves be combined with WFH?
* **Answer:** Yes, with prior email confirmation from the department head.

### Q35: What is the exit handover document format?
* **Answer:** Handovers must contain codebase walkthroughs, open tickets, and credentials transfer.

### Q36: Are there rewards for developer of the month?
* **Answer:** Yes, recognized developers receive a certificate and a shopping voucher.

### Q37: How do I apply for short term unpaid leave?
* **Answer:** Apply via HR portal and schedule a formal discussion with Priya Mehta.

### Q38: What support is provided to relocate to Indore?
* **Answer:** Relocation assistance covers 15 days of accommodation and travel expenses.

### Q39: Does the company provide transport support for late shifts?
* **Answer:** Cabs are arranged for employees working past 09:00 PM IST.

### Q40: Is there an employee grievance committee?
* **Answer:** Yes, led by Shubham Jain, Kamlesh Kushwah, and Priya Mehta.

### Q41: How is compliance with ISO 9001 ensured?
* **Answer:** Through annual external quality audits and weekly project reviews.

### Q42: What is the policy on social media posts about clients?
* **Answer:** Posting confidential project metrics or client details is strictly prohibited.

### Q43: Can I request an advance on my salary?
* **Answer:** Salary advances are approved only for medical emergencies, up to 1 month salary.

### Q44: What is the employee retention bonus timeline?
* **Answer:** Bonuses are paid at the end of 12 and 24 months of continuous service.

### Q45: Who manages the Indore office operations?
* **Answer:** Kamlesh Kushwah manages all local facility operations and testing jigs.

### Q46: Are training records audited?
* **Answer:** Yes, HR reviews training records quarterly to verify certification updates.

### Q47: What is the travel policy class of travel?
* **Answer:** Economy class for all flights under 6 hours; business class requires CEO approval.

### Q48: How do I claim per diem during travel?
* **Answer:** Log per diem claims matching the travel SOP rate for India/Europe.

### Q49: Are client dinners reimbursable?
* **Answer:** Yes, client entertainment expenses are reimbursable with itemized receipts.

### Q50: What is the exit clearance checklist?
* **Answer:** IT access revocation, physical asset return, final timesheet signoff, and HR exit interview.

doc_title: Frequently Asked Questions: Sales Process & Client Onboarding (Part 2)
chunk_text:
Document Title: Frequently Asked Questions: Sales Process & Client Onboarding (Part 2)
Document Type: FAQ Guide
Department: Sales
Section: Detailed Information

### Q26: What target industries do we focus on?
* **Answer:** Healthcare, logistics, manufacturing, AgTech, and retail sectors.

### Q27: How are developer resume profiles shared?
* **Answer:** Vetted profiles are redacted and shared as PDF resumes via HubSpot.

### Q28: What is the standard project kickoff SLA?
* **Answer:** Engineering teams are onboarded and kicked off within 46 to 72 hours.

### Q29: How do we resolve client onboarding conflicts?
* **Answer:** Conflicts are escalated to Kamlesh Kushwah for swift resolution.

### Q30: Can clients interview dedicated developers?
* **Answer:** Yes, clients can perform technical interviews with proposed engineers.

### Q31: What is the initial response SLA for sales inquiries? (Update 1)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Inbound sales inquiries must be answered within 24 hours. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q32: How do I request a free technical consultation? (Update 2)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Clients can schedule a 30-minute call via inurum.com/start. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q33: Who leads business development campaigns? (Update 3)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Shubham Saratha is the BDE lead coordinating sales strategies. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q34: What is the conversion target for sales leads? (Update 4)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Our sales goal is a conversion rate greater than 25% on qualified leads. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q35: Where are new leads logged? (Update 5)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: All customer leads and communications are logged in the HubSpot CRM. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q36: What is the standard duration of an MVP project? (Update 6)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: A standard mobile MVP ranges from 8 to 14 weeks from project kickoff. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q37: How is a project budget estimated? (Update 7)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Estimates are prepared after a tech plan blueprint phase based on sprint rates. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q38: What is the turnaround time for a custom quote? (Update 8)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Custom quotes and feasibility reviews are delivered in 12–24 hours. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q39: How do we market our technical capability? (Update 9)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Through developer blog posts, case studies, and LinkedIn updates. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q40: Who reviews commercial Statements of Work? (Update 10)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: SOWs are drafted by sales and approved by Shubham Jain or Kamlesh Kushwah. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q41: What pricing structures do we offer? (Update 11)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: We offer monthly dedicated developer retainers and Time & Materials sprint rates. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q42: How do we handle international billing? (Update 12)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Invoices are generated in USD or EUR and paid via bank transfers. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q43: What is the discount policy for startups? (Update 13)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Startups with seed funding can request up to 15% discount on early sprints. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q44: How do we secure project renewals? (Update 14)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Through quarterly feedback check-ins and performance KPI tracking. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q45: Who coordinates marketing content creation? (Update 15)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Neha Gupta coordinates the marketing team and content writers. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q46: What SEO keywords are target metrics? (Update 16)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Keywords: Flutter developer Indore, IoT development company, SaaS engineering. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q47: How is client satisfaction measured? (Update 17)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: CSAT reviews are conducted mid-project and post-launch via forms. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q48: Where do we publish case studies? (Update 18)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Case studies are published on inurum.com/case-studies and in the company repository. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q49: What is the process to draft a custom NDA? (Update 19)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Use the NDA template in the contracts folder and consult legal counsel. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q50: How is a client kickoff meeting scheduled? (Update 20)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Kickoff meetings are scheduled within 48 hours of contract signing. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q34: What is the conversion target for sales leads? (Update 4)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Our sales goal is a conversion rate greater than 25% on qualified leads. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q35: Where are new leads logged? (Update 5)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: All customer leads and communications are logged in the HubSpot CRM. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q36: What is the standard duration of an MVP project? (Update 6)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: A standard mobile MVP ranges from 8 to 14 weeks from project kickoff. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q37: How is a project budget estimated? (Update 7)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Estimates are prepared after a tech plan blueprint phase based on sprint rates. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q38: What is the turnaround time for a custom quote? (Update 8)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Custom quotes and feasibility reviews are delivered in 12–24 hours. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q39: How do we market our technical capability? (Update 9)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Through developer blog posts, case studies, and LinkedIn updates. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q40: Who reviews commercial Statements of Work? (Update 10)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: SOWs are drafted by sales and approved by Shubham Jain or Kamlesh Kushwah. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q41: What pricing structures do we offer? (Update 11)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: We offer monthly dedicated developer retainers and Time & Materials sprint rates. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q42: How do we handle international billing? (Update 12)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Invoices are generated in USD or EUR and paid via bank transfers. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q43: What is the discount policy for startups? (Update 13)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Startups with seed funding can request up to 15% discount on early sprints. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q44: How do we secure project renewals? (Update 14)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Through quarterly feedback check-ins and performance KPI tracking. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q45: Who coordinates marketing content creation? (Update 15)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Neha Gupta coordinates the marketing team and content writers. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q46: What SEO keywords are target metrics? (Update 16)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Keywords: Flutter developer Indore, IoT development company, SaaS engineering. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q47: How is client satisfaction measured? (Update 17)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: CSAT reviews are conducted mid-project and post-launch via forms. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q48: Where do we publish case studies? (Update 18)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Case studies are published on inurum.com/case-studies and in the company repository. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q49: What is the process to draft a custom NDA? (Update 19)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Use the NDA template in the contracts folder and consult legal counsel. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

### Q50: How is a client kickoff meeting scheduled? (Update 20)
* **Answer:** Follow-up: Kickoff meetings are scheduled within 48 hours of contract signing. Aligned with corporate guidelines.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Technical Specification: Database Documentation
Document Type: Technical Specification
Department: Engineering
Section: Detailed Information

### System Architecture & Specs
PostgreSQL database structures, row-level isolation for SaaS, and Redis caching.
Built using industry standards: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, PostgreSQL, Redis, and OpenSearch.

### Core Implementation
* **Cloud Architecture:** Hosted on AWS EKS and EC2 nodes.
* **Security & Auth:** JWT authentication via OAuth2 gateways.
* **Telematics Logs:** Ingestion via MQTT brokers (Mosquitto/EMQX).
* **Database Scaling:** Row-level security for tenant data.

### Configuration Parameters
```json
{
  "environment": "production",
  "auth_token_reference": "IN-7742-XP",
  "database_port": 5432,
  "redis_cache_ttl": 3600
}
```

raw_content: Educational reference manual, guidelines, and compliance objectives for the Customer Success Playbook training track.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Training Reference: Customer Success Playbook
Document Type: Training Material
Department: HR
Section: Detailed Information

### Training Objectives
This reference manual outlines the standard operating rules, compliance benchmarks, and skills required.
Support ticketing systems, SLAs, customer retention, and feedback loops.

### Key Learning Modules
1. **Module 1 (Introduction):** Familiarization with Inurum Technologies values and locations.
2. **Module 2 (Workplace Security):** Strict security protocols, password managers, and device locks.
3. **Module 3 (Development/Sales Flow):** Detailed procedures for execution matching ISO 9001.
4. **Module 4 (Verification & Quality):** Continuous improvement loops and validation criteria.

doc_title: Legal Contract: SOW: ELIoT Development Project
chunk_text:
Document Title: Legal Contract: SOW: ELIoT Development Project
Document Type: Contract Agreement
Department: Legal
Section: Detailed Information

### Legal Scope & Definitions
Statement of Work for ELIoT, outlining features, payment milestones, and deadlines.
Governed by Indian corporate laws (Indore jurisdiction) and European business guidelines where applicable (Legnano operations).

### Key Terms & Conditions
1. **Intellectual Property (IP):** All software, custom PCBs, and firmware codes developed are transferred to the client upon full payment.
2. **Payment Milestones:** Invoice generation occurs at the start of each development phase, Net-30 payment terms.
3. **Confidentiality:** Strict adherence to data privacy guidelines. Internal Auth Token reference: `IN-7742-XP`.
4. **Governing Law:** Jurisdiction of Indore, MP, India, or Legnano, Italy.

### Legal Scope & Definitions
Statement of Work for Fruitrack agricultural app design and telemetry support.
Governed by Indian corporate laws (Indore jurisdiction) and European business guidelines where applicable (Legnano operations).

### Key Terms & Conditions
1. **Intellectual Property (IP):** All software, custom PCBs, and firmware codes developed are transferred to the client upon full payment.
2. **Payment Milestones:** Invoice generation occurs at the start of each development phase, Net-30 payment terms.
3. **Confidentiality:** Strict adherence to data privacy guidelines. Internal Auth Token reference: `IN-7742-XP`.
4. **Governing Law:** Jurisdiction of Indore, MP, India, or Legnano, Italy.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Company Policy: Security Policy
Document Type: Policy Document
Department: HR
Section: Detailed Information

### Policy Statement & Scope
This policy applies to all Inurum Technologies employees globally, including Indore and Legnano offices, as well as contractors and dedicated customer teams.
Data protection, server access guidelines, and hardware lock requirements.

### Key Rules & Requirements
1. **Compliance Requirements:** Employees must strictly follow the rules to avoid security or quality breaches.
2. **Quality Standards:** Aligned with ISO 9001 and GDPR compliance frameworks.
3. **Internal Auth Key Reference:** `IN-7742-XP` must be utilized in access tokens.
4. **Audit and Verification:** Random monthly audit verification is handled by the Operations department.

### Procedures & Workflows
* **Submission:** Document submissions are routed to HR/Operations.
* **Review SLA:** Approvals are processed within 48 hours.
* **Non-compliance:** Subject to review by HR and Executive owners.

Document Type: Policy Document

Official policy details, scope, and adherence compliance rules for Data Privacy Policy at Inurum Technologies.
raw_content: Official policy details, scope, and adherence compliance rules for Data Privacy Policy at Inurum Technologies.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Company Policy: Data Privacy Policy
Document Type: Policy Document
Department: HR
Section: Detailed Information

### Policy Statement & Scope
This policy applies to all Inurum Technologies employees globally, including Indore and Legnano offices, as well as contractors and dedicated customer teams.
GDPR compliance, tenant database separation, and encryption standards.

### Key Rules & Requirements
1. **Compliance Requirements:** Employees must strictly follow the rules to avoid security or quality breaches.
2. **Quality Standards:** Aligned with ISO 9001 and GDPR compliance frameworks.
3. **Internal Auth Key Reference:** `IN-7742-XP` must be utilized in access tokens.
4. **Audit and Verification:** Random monthly audit verification is handled by the Operations department.

### Procedures & Workflows
* **Submission:** Document submissions are routed to HR/Operations.
* **Review SLA:** Approvals are processed within 48 hours.
* **Non-compliance:** Subject to review by HR and Executive owners.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Inurum Technologies - Company Glossary
Document Type: Glossary
Department: Operations
Section: Overview

Definitions of common acronyms, technical terms, and operational symbols used across Inurum Technologies.
raw_content: Definitions of common acronyms, technical terms, and operational symbols used across Inurum Technologies.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Inurum Technologies - Company Glossary
Document Type: Glossary
Department: Operations
Section: Detailed Information

### Terms & Definitions
* **BLoC (Business Logic Component):** State management standard in Flutter to isolate UI from business logic.
* **BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy):** Low-power wireless communication standard used in FYFIT and ELIoT hardware.
* **BOM (Bill of Materials):** Itemized list of hardware parts required for PCB manufacturing.
* **CAN-bus (Controller Area Network):** Vehicle bus standard permitting microcontrollers to communicate without hosts, used in diagnostics.
* **ELD (Electronic Logging Device):** Hardware plugged into trucks to log Hours of Service (HOS).
* **FVM (Flutter Version Manager):** Tool to configure and run specific Flutter SDK versions per project codebase.
* **GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation):** EU data privacy standard followed across all European engagements.
* **HOS (Hours of Service):** US/Canada compliance limits on driving hours for commercial truckers.
* **OTA (Over-The-Air):** Wireless deployment of firmware updates to deployed hardware devices.
* **PCB (Printed Circuit Board):** Custom physical circuit layouts designed in KiCAD/EAGLE.
* **Qi Standard:** Wireless charging interface specification, utilized in 8bottle and ELIoT.
* **RLS (Row-Level Security):** Database security feature to isolate tenant records inside shared PostgreSQL tables.
raw_content:
### Terms & Definitions
* **BLoC (Business Logic Component):** State management standard in Flutter to isolate UI from business logic.
* **BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy):** Low-power wireless communication standard used in FYFIT and ELIoT hardware.
* **BOM (Bill of Materials):** Itemized list of hardware parts required for PCB manufacturing.
* **CAN-bus (Controller Area Network):** Vehicle bus standard permitting microcontrollers to communicate without hosts, used in diagnostics.
* **ELD (Electronic Logging Device):** Hardware plugged into trucks to log Hours of Service (HOS).
* **FVM (Flutter Version Manager):** Tool to configure and run specific Flutter SDK versions per project codebase.
* **GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation):** EU data privacy standard followed across all European engagements.
* **HOS (Hours of Service):** US/Canada compliance limits on driving hours for commercial truckers.
* **OTA (Over-The-Air):** Wireless deployment of firmware updates to deployed hardware devices.
* **PCB (Printed Circuit Board):** Custom physical circuit layouts designed in KiCAD/EAGLE.
* **Qi Standard:** Wireless charging interface specification, utilized in 8bottle and ELIoT.
* **RLS (Row-Level Security):** Database security feature to isolate tenant records inside shared PostgreSQL tables.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Standard Operating Procedure: Sales SOP
Document Type: SOP Document
Department: Engineering
Section: Detailed Information

### Objective & Roles
The goal of this SOP is to ensure high quality and consistency across all projects.
Lead qualification, SOW preparation, pricing models, and client kickoff.

raw_content: Description, technology stack, target customer profile, and benefits of Inurum Technologies' ERP Integration service offering.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Service Offering: ERP Integration
Document Type: Service Guide
Department: Sales
Section: Detailed Information

### Service Description
Bridging custom mobile and backend applications with enterprise ERP databases (SAP, Oracle) securely.

### Technology Stack
* **Core Technologies:** Java, Spring Boot, SOAP/REST APIs, Secure Gateways
* **Development Standards:** Following strict ISO 9001 and secure software guidelines.

### Benefits to Clients
* Rapid delivery speed with dedicated, experienced engineering teams.
* Zero integration friction thanks to full-stack, no-handoffs coordination.
* High system reliability (99.9% crash-free session target).

### Target Customer Segments
* **Target Customers:** Supply chain, retail, and manufacturing organizations

### Quality & Compliance Standards
Inurum Technologies operates with international credentials to deliver enterprise-ready products:
* **ISO 9001 Certification:** Quality management systems certified for software engineering.
* **GDPR Compliance:** Standard data processing agreements (DPA) implemented across EU operations.
* **SOC2 & HIPAA Ready:** Architectures designed to support strict medical and financial compliance.

### Strategic Partnerships
* **TechCrafters (Italy):** European operations coordination and local client liaison.
* **Wisecrop (Portugal):** Agricultural telemetry research alliance.
* **GardenStuff (Italy):** Smart home product engineering and hardware production coordinates.

chunk_text:
Document Title: Inurum Technologies - Company Overview
Document Type: Company Guide
Department: Executive
Section: Detailed Information

### Introduction & Profile
**Inurum Technologies** is an elite end-to-end product engineering company headquartered in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India, with European operations based in Legnano, Italy. The company specializes in building high-performance mobile applications, internet-of-things (IoT) products, and scalable software-as-a-service (SaaS) backend platforms for both startups and enterprises globally.

* **Tagline:** Flutter App, IoT & SaaS Development Company in Indore, India
* **Primary Website:** https://www.inurum.com
* **General Email:** info@inurum.com
* **General Phone:** +91-7974334291

### Core Philosophy: "One Team, Full Stack, No Handoffs"
At Inurum, software and hardware are treated with the same structural integrity as physical construction. The core operational philosophy centers on eliminating integration delays and blame games by unifying all engineering facets under a single team:
* **Hardware Engineering** (PCB Design, RF Tuning, Signal Integrity)
* **Embedded Firmware** (C/C++, RTOS, Power Optimization)
* **Mobile Applications** (Flutter, Native iOS, Native Android)
* **Backend Infrastructure** (Scalable APIs, Cloud Hosting, Databases)

### Locations & Coordinates
1. **Indore Headquarters (India):**
   * Address: Plot No. 388, Infront of Retina Hospital, Scheme No. 54 PU4, Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India - 452010
   * Coordinates: 22.7196° N, 75.8577° E
   * Office Hours: Monday to Friday, 09:00 - 18:00 (IST)
2. **European Operations (Italy):**
   * Address: Via Grazia Deledda, 11, Legnano (MI) - ITALY
   * Coordinates: 45.5953° N, 8.9147° E
   * Contact Partner Email: contact@techcrafters.it
